Note: consult [m11-steady-state-conformance-loop.md](../../docs/governance/m11-steady-state-conformance-loop.md) for the full governance model; use this template only as the intentional-change front door.

- Affected packages, surfaces, or behaviors:

- Relevant sections of #987:

- #993 inherited execution-evidence baseline check:
- Alignment or extension note:

- Affected routes, providers, manifests, contracts, adapters, registries, glue, or verification seams:
- New surfaces introduced: Yes / No

## Dependency & Ordering Check

- #990 check result:
- Upstream, downstream, or lateral dependencies touched:

## Verification Plan

- Tests or suites to add or update:
- Expected behavior before change:
- Expected behavior after change:
- Tie-back to #987:

## Invariant Check

- Pre-change expectations against #988:
- Post-change expectations against #988:

- Commit refs:
- Test results:
- Invariant results:
- Protected-upstream confirmation:
- No-new-audit-surface confirmation:

## Governance Decision

- Decision: Accepted / Rejected / Needs revision
- Reviewer notes:
